title: PDF Viewer chromeless workspace UI (dbg108)
description:
PDF Viewer no longer shows the large header/toolbar — the continuous PDF canvas uses the full pane height. Map workspace keeps its existing toolbar unchanged.

In PDF Viewer fullscreen: floating ✕ close (top-right); draggable Line size and Opacity widgets when Line/Eraser tool is active (+/− and Ctrl+/Ctrl− keybinds unchanged). Export assembled PDF is Map-only. Map/Viewer workspace toggle removed — open each mode from the unified explorer right-click menu.

Who is affected: OVH private server PipeSync Plan View PDF Viewer.
changeLog: Remove PDF Viewer header/toolbar; full-height continuous canvas.
Floating close button top-right in PDF Viewer fullscreen.
Draggable Line size and Opacity widgets when Line tool is active.
Export assembled PDF Map-only; removed from PDF Viewer.
Remove Map/PDF Viewer dropdown; use explorer context menu.
Eraser in right-click Tools menu for PDF Viewer.
